$description: Per-scenario perceptual-hash tolerance for the visual-regression loop. Values are Hamming-distance thresholds on a 64-bit PHASH; pairs with distance > threshold count as drift. Default applied when a scenario id is absent from this map.
$rules: Bumping a threshold to silence drift is a code smell. Prefer to fix the regression, or bless the new screenshot via `bash scripts/loop/run_one_scenario_loop.sh --bless <scenario.json>`.
Per-step overrides (`<scenario_id>.<step_idx>`) take precedence over the per-scenario value.
Threshold semantics: 0 = identical, 64 = totally different. Empirical baseline for unrelated UI changes is ~12-18; subpixel differences are typically 0-3.
